commit.message:
Refactor DSP to stereo, fix drum preset export, and misc improvements

- Refactor DSP from mono int16 to interleaved stereo int16 (L,R,L,R,...)
- Mono WAV files duplicated to both channels on load
- Support PCM 16-bit, PCM 24-bit, and IEEE float 32-bit input
- WAV output always stereo 16-bit PCM
- Waveform display and zero-crossing use L channel
- Fix DSP export symbol: plugin_init -> move_plugin_init_v2
- Fix build.sh to copy from src/dsp/dsp.so (Docker output path)
- Fix drum preset sampleUri: URL-encode spaces (%20)
- Default auto slice threshold from 5 to 25
- Disable loop playback in slice mode, restore on exit
- Back from record-ready state exits module entirely

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Add mm/inches unit setting with live DetailWindow updates

- Add Measurement Units submenu (mm / inches) to Settings menu
- Persist and sync unit preference across all windows
- DetailWindow Calibrated Sheet mode now respects the unit setting:
  - Reference size input label updates to mm or in
  - User's calibration input converted from in→mm internally (px/mm stays canonical)
  - D50/D90 results display in the selected unit
  - Histogram x-axis labels and unit tag update on the fly
- Switching units resets calibration and clears stale results

commit.message:
fix(queries): correct ae_cpu pivot and crafting jobs range

- Fix ae_cpu Flux query: group by _field before last() so co_processors,
  is_busy and storage all survive — previous grouping dropped all but
  storage from the pivot output
- Filter out pre-index legacy rows (cpu_index not exists) to avoid stale
  Unnamed/0 entry polluting the CPU grid
- Fix CPU display name: toLower comparison so "Unnamed" → "CPU N"
- Widen craftingJobs range -5m → -3m and add completion<100 filter;
  -5m was too tight for 60s AE poll interval plus network latency

commit.message:
docs: API v1 버전 관리 및 엔드포인트별 Rate Limiting 문서화 (#172)

* feat: API 버전 관리 (v1 prefix) 도입 (#167)

- /api/ → /api/v1/ 라우터 prefix 변경
- /api/* 레거시 경로를 /api/v1/*로 307 리다이렉트하여 하위 호환 유지
- Dockerfile HEALTHCHECK 경로 업데이트
- 전체 테스트 코드 경로를 /api/v1/로 업데이트
- 레거시 리다이렉트 테스트 4건 추가

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: 엔드포인트별 Rate Limiting 세분화 (#169)

- 엔드포인트별 rate limit 설정 외부화 (환경변수):
  RATE_LIMIT_DESCRIBE (20/minute), RATE_LIMIT_BATCH (10/minute),
  RATE_LIMIT_DATA (30/minute), RATE_LIMIT_READ (60/minute)
- Rate limit 초과 시 RFC 7807 형식 에러 응답 반환
- Retry-After 헤더 포함
- 엔드포인트별 독립적 rate limit 풀 테스트 추가

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: Retry-After 헤더 RFC 7231 준수 및 테스트 경로 v1 업데이트

- _rate_limit_handler: retry_after가 datetime 객체일 때 현재 시각과의 차이를
  초(int)로 변환하여 RFC 7231 스펙 준수 (str(datetime) → ISO 문자열 버그 수정)
- test_rate_limit.py: /api/* → /api/v1/* 경로 업데이트 (PR #170 rebase 반영)
- test_429_response_body: Retry-After 헤더 값이 양의 정수인지 검증 추가

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* docs: API v1 버전 관리 및 엔드포인트별 Rate Limiting 문서화 (#167, #169)

- README: 모든 API 경로 /api/* → /api/v1/* 업데이트
- README: 레거시 /api/* → /api/v1/* 307 리다이렉트 안내 추가
- README: Rate Limiting 섹션을 엔드포인트별 세분화 표로 개선
- README: RATE_LIMIT_* 환경변수 4종 환경변수 표에 추가
- CHANGELOG: [Unreleased] 섹션에 v1 prefix 및 rate limit 항목 추가

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix UploadPost sync: parse social_accounts dict, use profiles array

Root cause found: UploadPost API returns social_accounts as a dict
keyed by platform name (not connected_accounts array), and the
profiles list is under data.profiles (not data.users).

Actual API response structure:
  { profiles: [{ username, social_accounts: {
      instagram: { handle, display_name, social_images },
      linkedin: { handle, display_name, social_images }
  }}]}

- Add parseSocialAccounts() to convert dict to ConnectedAccount[]
- Map handle→platform_username, social_images→profile_image_url
- Parse data.profiles in listUploadPostUsers()
- Remove unused getUploadPostUserAccounts (data is on profile)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Add Mem0 semantic memory system (feature-flagged)

- New mem0_engine.py: Mem0 + Qdrant embedded for vector-based memory
  storage, semantic search, and auto-dedup. Keeps existing pre-filter
  and junk filter logic.
- workspace_manager.py: add build_prompt_for_user() for per-message
  prompt building with relevant memories.
- app_new.py: all 3 chat endpoints (stream, non-stream, voice) now
  support MEM0_ENABLED flag. When enabled, searches relevant memories
  before each message and updates workspace prompt in the same HTTP
  call as model sync.
- migrate_memories_to_mem0.py: one-time migration script from MongoDB
  to Qdrant.
- Controlled by MEM0_ENABLED env var — false by default, zero impact
  on existing system until explicitly enabled.

V32 UI Recovery — 4-destination canonical shell + SAGE panel

Shell restructured from V31's 6-screen model to V32's 4-destination truth:
- Dashboard (/os) — executive home with metrics, booking health, SAGE CTA

Modified: shell-store (4 types + sagePanelOpen), ShellPage (legacy mapping),
ShellLayout (4 screens + SagePanel), ShellSidebar (4 nav items + sage toggle),
MobileBottomNav (4 destinations + sage center), ToolsScreen (Pipeline + Campaigns
added as sales category), App.tsx (pipeline route restored), routes.ts (pipeline
no longer legacy redirect)

TS 0 errors. Vite build clean.

Add ICESCR Articles 3, 4, and 5 (P2/P3 covenant coverage)

Article 3 — Equal Rights of Men and Women: algorithmic pay gap
perpetuation, motherhood penalty in AI systems, healthcare AI gender
bias, caregiving and social protection equity.

Article 4 — Permissible Limitations: the three-part test (by law,
compatible with right's nature, general welfare in democratic society),
AI systems as de facto rights limitations, algorithmic benefit denial,
predictive policing and economic rights.

Article 5 — Prohibition on Destruction of Rights: floor-not-ceiling
principle, anti-efficiency-argument standard, preservation of stronger
domestic protections after ratification, AI transition pretext
constrained.

Closes all outstanding covenant coverage gaps (Arts. 2–5, 8 now live).

commit.message:
Improve UX: fix feature commands and reduce truncation/repetition

Round 7 fixes:
- P0: Fix /habits, /mood, /bookmarks, /checkin commands intercepted by F.text
  handler. Added ~F.text.startswith("/") filter to handle_message so command
  handlers registered after it are reachable.
- P1: Raise chat_max_tokens default 4096->8192 (upper limit 16384) to reduce
  response truncation (~29% of responses).
- P1: Improve repetition guard: lower threshold 0.6->0.5, add sentence-level
  comparison, add sub-phrase detection (5-gram windows across 2+ previous
  messages) to catch repeated phrases like "не делает тебя плохой мамой".
- P1: Expand bookmark signal patterns to match "сохрани его/её/их" and
  "запомни его/её/их" in addition to "это/момент". Fixes 4/8 personas
  not getting bookmark save confirmations.
- P1: Add venting emotion signals for стыдно, страшно, боюсь, тревожно,
  тревога, паника, одиноко, потерялся, неловко. Fixes empathy-first mode
  not triggering on fear/shame expressions (Artem 2x).

  - É Reset? false → Supabase - Pausa Conversa
- É Operador? false → Supabase - Lê Config (direto, sem filtro intermediário)
- Remove Filtro - Mensagem Válida? (redundante — Parse Evolution Payload já
  seta ignore:true para casos inválidos, É Operador? já filtra)

commit.message:
Fix SQL injection vulnerability in query.set_database() (#79)

This commit fixes a critical SQL injection vulnerability that occurred when
database names contained single quotes (e.g., "GPWS: Don't Sink"). The issue
was caused by using string formatting to build SQL queries instead of
parameterized queries.

Changes:
- Updated localdata.py get_data() and delete_data() to support parameterized
  queries via tuple format (where_clause, params)
- Fixed flight.py __get_fieldtree(), __save_fieldtree(), and __get_filter()
  to use parameterized queries
- Fixed analytic.py _load_paramtable() and _save_paramtable() to use
  parameterized queries
- Added comprehensive security tests to verify SQL injection prevention
- Maintained backward compatibility with existing string-based API

All existing tests pass, plus new security tests confirm that:
- Database names with single quotes work correctly
- SQL injection attempts are properly neutralized
- Data integrity is maintained

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-authored-by: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

- .tdd/ directory replaces .planning/phases/ (TEST-PLAN.md, state.json, TEST-REVIEW.md)
- TEST-PLAN.md is the single artifact: test specs + implementation tasks
- /tdd:execute tracks progress in state.json with resume support
- Two modes: Linear (fetch task, post clarifications) and Standalone (code or description)
- install.sh uses clone+symlink (no file copying or path rewriting)
